G1.name: Transparency
G1.description: The documentation should be clear, complete, and correct

G2.name: Usefulness
G2.description: The document should be accessible, useful, and actionable

M1.name: Clarity
M1.description: The document and the information should be simple and clear

M2.name: Completeness
M2.description: The document and information must be filled in completely

M3.name: Consistency
M3.description: The information must be consistent with the model and other documentation

M4.name: Correctness
M4.description: The information must be correct and accurate

M5.name: Accessibility
M5.description: The document and information must be accessible for stakeholders

M6.name: Comprehension
M6.description: The document and information must be comprehensible for stakeholders

A+.label: Excellent
A+.description: Documentation is transparent and useful with very few, if any, limitations

A.label: Highly Satisfactory
A.description: Documentation is transparent and useful with some limitations

B+.label: Satisfactory
B+.description: Documentation is transparent and useful but has numerous limitations

B.label: Acceptable
B.description: Documentation is mostly transparent and useful with some major limitations

C+.label: Adequate
C+.description: Documentation is somewhat transparent and useful with major limitations

C.label: Marginal
C.description: Documentation is not transparent and useful and has some major limitations

D+.label: Inadequate
D+.description: Documentation is not transparent and useful and has several major limitations

D.label: Unsatisfactory
D.description: Documentation is not transparent and useful and has systemic limitations

F.label: Unacceptable
F.description: Documentation is not provided or has systemic problems
